event_title: [sfscala.org] By the Bay End of Year Party with Bill Venners, Essence of Testing
title: By the Bay End of Year Party with Bill Venners, Essence of Testing
description: By the Bay family of meetups is holding the end of year party at Clara (https://www.meetup.com/SF-Scala/events/236052360/). Note: AI.vision (http://ai.vision/), self.driving.cars (http://self.driving.cars/) and oh.hai.ai (http://oh.hai.ai/) Early Birds also end with the year on 12/31. Single sign-up at http://sfscala.org . The space is limited so only sign up if you can attend! https://www.meetup.com/SF-Scala/events/236052360/
